pr.title: Record: 0.0881 BPB — 11L Int5 GPTQ + Order-12 N-gram + Phrase Cache + 65K Chunks

output.summary: Uses an int5-quantized 11L base model with order-12 n-gram plus phrase caches and 65K-token chunks for single-pass cache evaluation.
techniques: Order-12 n-gram + long phrase cache with temperature sharpening
65K-token chunk score-first cache eval to fit depth-specific budgets
Full Hessian GPTQ int5 quantization with LZMA compression
